raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "24. Ta gahje Israëka Behrni
prett Benjamina Behrneem oh-
trâ Deenâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "25. Bet Benjamins gahje
team pretti no Gibejas ohtrâ
Deenâ / un kawe no Israëka
Behrneem weht astonpadefinitis
tuhkstoschus/ wiffus tahdus/ kas
Sohbinu iswilke.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "26. Tad gahje wiffi Israëka
Behrni/ un wiffi Laudis us aug-
tchu/ un nahze usta STIPRA
DEEWA Namun / un randan-
ja/ un palikte tur preeffch ta
KUNGGA un gaweja tai Deenâ
lihds Wakkaram / un uppureja
Didsainus-Uppureus un Pateik-
schanas-Uppureus preeffch ta
KUNGGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "27. Un Israëka Behrni wai-
zaja to KUNGGA/ jo tur bija tas
Schkirsts tahs Deeiva Derribas
tannis Deenâs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "28. Un Pineas/ Eleasara Aa-
roka Dehla Dehls stahweja tan-
nis Deenâs preeffsch wizzu/ faz-
zidains : Irr man wehl ja-iseet
Karrâ prett Benjamina Behr-
neem mannu Brahti / jeb buhs
man atstahtees? Un tas KUNGGS
fazzija: Zelleetees augschaim/ jo
riht dohfschues tohs tawâ Rohkâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "29. Tad erzehle Israëls tah-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "dus/ kas fleppent turrejahs pre
Gibeju apkahrt.
30. Un Israëka Behrni gah-
us angichu treschâ Deenâ pret
Benjamina Behrneem/ un taif
jahs prett Gibeju/ ka zittkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "31. Tad iggahje Benjaminis
Behrni teem Laudim pretti / u-
tappe no ta Pilsfahta noschKirti
un falze kaut un eewainoht toh
Laudis/ itt ka pirnak diwirei
us teem Zelkeem/ fur weens tek
us Beteli/ un ohtrs us Gibeju
Lauka/tahdustrihsdefinitis Wihrus no Israëta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "32. Tad fazzija Benjaminis
Behrni: Tee irr kanti preekic-
mums/- itt ka pirnak/ bet Israe-
ta Behrni fazzija: Behgtim/ un
noschkirtin tohs no ta Pilsfahta
us teem Zelkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "33. Tad zehlahs wiffi Israëka
Wihrî no sawas Weetas / un fa-
taisijahs eeksch Baäl Tahmaras,
ta lihds arridsan zehlahs tee Israë-
literi/ kas no pakkatenes fleppen
turrejahs/ no tahs Allas Gaba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "34. Un definitis tuhkstoschi is-
taziti Wihrî no wiffa Israëta
nahze prett Gibeju / un tee ka-
wahs brefsmigi/ tomehr tee ne sin-
naja/ ka tas Launnuns paschue
buhtu afsnehmis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "35. Ta kawe tas KUNGGA
Benjaminu preeffsch Israëta / jo
Israëta Behrni apkawe tai Deenâ no Benjaminra diwidefinits
peez tuhkstochus un timts Wihrus/ wiffus tahdus/ kas to Soh-
binu iswilke.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
